section.title: AI Use Across Project Performance Domains
section.description: This section focuses on how frequently AI tools are used across the eight Project Performance Domains defined in PMBOK (8th Edition).

questions.text: For each Project Performance Domain below, indicate how often you use AI tools to support related tasks and activities.
questions.hint: Consider both standalone AI tools and AI features embedded in project management or delivery tools. Select one option per row.

rows.label: **Stakeholders**
rows.description: Identifying, analyzing, and engaging stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle

rows.label: **Team**
rows.description: Building, developing, and managing an effective and collaborative project team

rows.label: **Development Approach & Life Cycle**
rows.description: Selecting, tailoring, and adapting the development approach and project life cycle

rows.label: **Planning**
rows.description: Organizing and coordinating activities; establishing baselines, schedules, and plans

rows.label: **Project Work**
rows.description: Establishing processes and performing work to deliver intended project outcomes

rows.label: **Delivery**
rows.description: Delivering the intended scope, quality, and value outcomes of the project

rows.label: **Measurement**
rows.description: Assessing project performance, analyzing results, and taking appropriate corrective actions

rows.label: **Uncertainty**
rows.description: Managing risks, ambiguity, and complexity across the project lifecycle

questions.text: Use AI to generate or quality-assure project status reports:
questions.hint: For the Measurement domain specifically, how often do you use AI for this activity?

questions.text: Use AI to forecast schedule or budget overruns:
questions.hint: For the Measurement domain specifically, how often do you use AI for forecasting schedule or cost deviations?
